title: 10 Yards 63mm Brown Glitter Mesh Ribbon Gold Wire Edge Web Trim Sparkling Metallic with Sequins Spools Fabric Wide Ribbons for Gift Wrapping Christmas Tree Wreath Party Decorations Diy Craft
features: Brown Mesh Ribbon: This ribbon is a mesh design reminiscent of delicate lace and is able to add elegance to your project
Glitter Mesh Ribbon: This ribbon is evenly spaced with shiny sequins to add sparkle and appeal to your project
Size: There are 10 yards of brown glitter mesh ribbon. The brown glitter mesh ribbon: about 2.48 inch(63mm) wide, 10 yards/ roll(9.14m/ roll)

Material: Brown wire edge glitter mesh ribbon is made of polyester, which is not easy to wear, tear and fade, and can be used for a long time, in addition, the wire edge makes it hold its shape well, making it very easy to use

Versatile: Brown wire edge glitter mesh ribbon is versatile, perfect for sewing, wrapping gift boxes, making handmade crafts and making decorations for christmas, weddings and more, for example, you can use it to make bows and garlands to decorate your christmas tree and bouquet
description: Product Description CABODYALS, the sewing expert by your side. We understand that sewing is not only a craft, but also an expression of art and emotion. Since inception, CABODYALS has been committed to providing sewing enthusiasts with the highest quality sewing products. Our product line covers everything from basic sewing ribbons, laces, threads, embroidery patches, etc. Each product is carefully selected to ensure that fulfill your ultimate pursuit of the sewing. Flower Embroidered Ribbon Trim Flower Embroidered Ribbon: Red represents warmth and enthusiasm, flower embroidered ribbon with bright red as the main color, used to embellish monotonous color clothing or fabric is very suitable Pink Chiffon Fringe Ribbon Pink Chiffon Ribbon: The pink chiffon ribbon is a very gentle gray pink color, handmade tassel edges, make the pink chiffon ribbon become more natural, soft and look more layered Sheer Ribbon Christmas Wrapping Ribbon Dark Red Sheer Ribbon: Red represents enthusiasm and warmth, but also as the representative color of Christmas, using dark red sheer ribbon to decorate the Christmas party or gift box is very appropriate, very much in line with the atmosphere of Christmas Flower Jacquard Ribbon Trim 3D Jacquard Ribbon Trim Red: The unique and texture RIBBON AND TRIM Fruit Printed Ribbon Fruit Printed Ribbon: The fruit printed ribbon with white as the base color, single sided printing embellished with full printed strawberries,
